content.en:
"For the time being, I don't need to face the god-level powerhouses of the other universe, and I need to go to the Chaos God Realm again!"

Ye Tian decided.

The temple in the Chaos God Realm, he can't go in again, but he can go to the Chaos God Realm, and he still has many questions to ask Niu Ryu.

And just in time, the fog zone is about to open again.

Wow!

Ye Tian disappeared from the Heavenly Pavilion and headed for the misty area, and it didn't take long for him to come to the Sea of Chaos.

After waiting for decades, the foggy area reappeared.

Ye Tian crossed the misty area and entered the Chaos God Realm.

As soon as Ye Tian entered the Chaos God Realm, Niu Ryu appeared and said respectfully: "Your Highness, you are here!"

"Well, Ushiru, I have something I need to ask you!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Your Highness, please speak!"

Niu Ryu Road.

"Have you heard of the Source Force Talent?" Ye Tian asked.

"Source Force Talent?" Niu Ryu was stunned for a moment, and then shook his head: "I haven't heard of it, but the ancestor may have heard of it, I'll ask the ancestor and ask His Highness to wait a minute." "

Immediately, a wisp of Niu Ryu incarnated and went to the place where the ancestor of the Niu people clan was.

Soon after, the incarnation of Niu Ryu returned, and said: "Your Highness, the ancestor knows the source force talent, which is said to be the same as the strength talent, but the source force talent is even rarer, and it involves a higher secret, even our cattle people don't know much. But in the midst of the chaos, some truly top geniuses seem to have special talents such as source force talents!"

Ye Tian understood as soon as he heard it, origin talents are very rare in chaos, they are only possessed by true geniuses, if you want to transform ordinary talents into origin talents, I am afraid you need to pay a great price.

Ye Tian originally wanted to ask about the source place, but the Niu Ren clan didn't even know what the origin talent knew, let alone knew the source place.

Besides, the source is afraid that it involves a big secret, and he is not allowed to tell it.

And although the Lord of the Yuan Gu also knew the source land, he didn't know the source place at all, and he just fought with some weak source people for a hundred years.

Therefore, he is not worried about the secrets of the source being revealed.

"Niu Ryu, now that the two universes are colliding and merging, if the fusion fails, the universe will disappear, are we the creatures in the universe going to die?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"Almost!" Niu Ryu said, "I'm in the universe now, so I've learned a lot about it in the classics of the clan." Although the fusion of the two universes is rare in chaos, many forces will do it secretly, even if some transcendent forces want to stop it, but the chaos is so big, there are many remote universes, and new universes are often born. So, this kind of thing can't be forbidden. Besides, with the fusion of the two universes, such small things can't disturb those powers in the realm of merger. Your Highness, you are not yet detached, according to my estimates, it will take at least tens of millions of years for the dual universe to truly face the critical moment of fusion. As long as His Highness transcends detachment within 10 million years, he will not be affected by the destruction of the universe. The only thing to worry about is that His Highness's talent will disappear with the complete annihilation of the universe, but if His Highness becomes an official disciple of that great being, it is really a simple matter to restore his talent. "

"What is the chance that the two universes will merge into a large universe?"

Ye Tian asked.

"How many percent?" Niu Ryu shook his head and said, "There is no one percent, if there is no special way, there is only about a three percent chance." If you pay some price, you may be able to increase to 10%, but this depends on luck and there is no guarantee. "

"A three-percent success rate, tens of millions of years!"

Ye Tian's brows furrowed.

Tens of thousands of years of transcendence, he is naturally sure, but if he really does this, then his wife, sister, and human race will probably be annihilated.

This is not the result he was expecting!

Moreover, he did not want to be just a simple detachment, but the most powerful detachment.

The most perfect ending is that the two universes merge into the big universe, and he is detached from the big universe.

In addition, the lifespan of the great universe is very long, unlike the ordinary universe, which will be destroyed again and again, if the eternal universe and the Cangyu universe really merge into the great universe, even if those creatures are not detached, they can live for a long time, until the end of their life.

"Niu Ryu, is there a way to increase the success rate of the dual universe fusion?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No way!" Niu Ryu said truthfully: "At least we cattle people can't help it, I used to be interested in this aspect, and I asked the ancestor, but even the ancestor didn't know." If anyone ever knew, it was the Great Being. But now you are only a reserve official disciple, maybe you have become an official disciple, and you can expect to meet that great being and ask about the fusion of the two universes!"

"Formal disciple!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At present, the only way to become an official disciple is to become a three-star god general, which is not very difficult, but he has only become a two-star god general not long now, and it will take a long time to become a three-star god general.

The key problem is that even if he becomes a three-star god general and becomes an official disciple, if he is not officially recognized by that great being, I am afraid that that great existence will not tell him about the transcendence of the dual universe.

There is another way, which is to comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram and become a disciple of that great being, which will definitely be valued, but this is too difficult.

At least, Ye Tian felt that he didn't have much hope of comprehending the Void Heaven Diagram, except for occasionally comprehending it, he spent the rest of his time cultivating for anything else.

"Let's be promoted to a three-star god general first and become an official disciple of that great existence!"

Ye Tian thought.

Ye Tian chatted with Niu Ryu for a long time, and then left the Chaos God Realm.

He didn't want to stay in the Chaos God Realm for more than 10,000 years, that would disrupt his plans.

After coming out of the Chaos God Realm, Ye Tian made a deal with some first-class supremes from the Twelve Universe Eras, allowing them to share some inheritance lands, and he gave them benefits.

In this way, Ye Tian entered one inheritance land after another, but in the end, he only entered a dozen inheritance places, after all, it was unlikely that there would be too many inheritance lands in just one month, and many inheritance lands that the Supreme entered were duplicates.

And just like that, another 3,000 years passed.

Compared to three thousand years ago, Ye Tian's strength had only increased a little, but the strength of the human race and the strength of the Heavenly Pavilion had skyrocketed a lot.

Ye Tian tilted most of the resources he didn't need to cultivate the members of the Heavenly Pavilion, and the other resources cultivated the geniuses of the human race.

Under such a cultivation regardless of the cost, the Heavenly Pavilion gave birth to seven or eight supremes, including Xiao Yue, Ye Yu, and Zhou Tian.

this day.

Ye Tian was in retreat and cultivating, and a message came.

"Ten Thousand Laws Supreme, help!"

This message came from the First Divine Lord of the Protoss, and the Protoss had encountered a great crisis.
